problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: Combining Liquid crystal elastomer actuation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
